subtitle.en: peacock tail barbules contain a 2D lattice of melanin rods in keratin; different lattice spacings in the same feather give blue, green, copper, and yellow eye-spot zones
subtitle.ko: 공작 깃털 안 2D 멜라닌-keratin 격자; 같은 깃털에서 격자 간격이 청·녹·동·황 띠 만든다

description.en: Lattice schematic + eye-spot swatch. Slider tunes lattice constant; reflected colour cycles through visible. Same molecule everywhere — only spacing varies.
description.ko: 격자 schematic + eye-spot swatch. 격자 상수 슬라이더로 반사색 변화. 같은 분자, 다른 간격.
